title.zh: 在平原蛇群之后追讨血债的蛇父
title.en: The Father of Serpents Who Collects a Blood-Debt

summary.zh: 美国平原上传说的蛇之父，通常宽容，却会向杀蛇者降下追猎、变形与延续到后代的报复。
summary.en: A serpent father of the American plains, ordinarily tolerant but relentless toward those who kill his children.

description.zh:
伊格主要出自洛夫克拉夫特为泽莉娅·毕晓普修订、实质重写的《伊格的诅咒》。在移民拓荒的俄克拉何马平原，蛇被视为它的子嗣。伊格不像完全无视人类的宇宙力量：它拥有清楚的禁忌与报复逻辑。人若无端杀蛇，秋季便可能听见门外越来越近的沙沙声，最终遭受蛇袭、半蛇化或延续至后代的异变。

故事把本土传说、殖民地想象和作者自创神名混合在一起，没有可靠依据证明伊格属于任何真实原住民传统。因此称它为“古印第安神”会把虚构伪装成民族志。更准确的方式，是把它放回1920年代通俗杂志的协作写作现场：一位署名作者、一位重写者，以及被他们想象出来的平原神话。伊格后来进入共享神系，成为少数具有道德边界的存在——它的愤怒并非随机，只在有人先让鳞片沾血时醒来。
description.en:
Yig comes chiefly from “The Curse of Yig,” credited to Zealia Bishop but extensively rewritten by Lovecraft. On the settler frontier of Oklahoma, snakes are understood as the deity’s children. Unlike cosmic forces that barely register humanity, Yig possesses a legible taboo and a pattern of reprisal. Someone who kills snakes without cause may hear rustling approach the door in autumn, then suffer attack, serpentine transformation, or an alteration carried into the next generation.

The tale blends frontier rumor, colonial fantasy, and an invented divine name. No reliable evidence establishes Yig as a figure from any actual Indigenous tradition, so describing it as an “ancient Indian god” would turn pulp fiction into false ethnography. It is more accurate to return the entity to the collaborative magazine culture of the 1920s: a credited author, a ghost-rewriter, and an imagined plains mythology. Later shared-world fiction adopted Yig as one of the few powers with a moral boundary. Its anger is not random; it awakens after someone else first stains the scales with blood.

value.zh: 泽莉娅·毕晓普署名、洛夫克拉夫特重写《伊格的诅咒》
value.en: “The Curse of Yig,” credited to Zealia Bishop and rewritten by Lovecraft

value.zh: 虚构神名，不属于已证实的原住民神系
value.en: A fictional name, not an attested Indigenous deity

sources.zh: 泽莉娅·毕晓普、H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特《伊格的诅咒》
sources.en: Zealia Bishop and H. P. Lovecraft, “The Curse of Yig”

sources.zh: S. T. 乔希、David E. Schultz《H. P. Lovecraft Encyclopedia》
sources.en: S. T. Joshi and David E. Schultz, An H. P. Lovecraft Encyclopedia
